user.title: BMW CarData
user.description: Enter your BMW CarData Client ID from My BMW > CarData.

authorize.title: Authorize Device

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to BMW OAuth service.
error.authorization_pending: Authorization is not completed yet. Finish authorization on BMW website and retry.
error.slow_down: Polling too fast. Wait a few seconds and try again.
error.access_denied: Authorization was denied on BMW website.
error.invalid_client: Client ID is invalid or not activated.
error.invalid_request: Invalid request sent to BMW OAuth service.
error.unknown_oauth_error: BMW OAuth returned an unknown error.
error.invalid_stream_port: Stream port must be a valid number.

abort.already_configured: This BMW account is already configured.
abort.missing_flow_state: Flow state was lost. Restart setup.

error.invalid_stream_port: Stream port must be a valid number.
